brackenford_square.name: Brackenford Square
brackenford_square.description: The cobbled heart of Brackenford. A well stands at its centre, ringed by shops and the comings and goings of townsfolk.

gilded_stag.name: The Gilded Stag
gilded_stag.description: A warm, smoky tavern loud with laughter and the clink of tankards.

stag_cellar.name: The Stag's Cellar
stag_cellar.description: A dank cellar of ale barrels and crates — and the scrabble of vermin.

the_rest.name: The Weary Rest
the_rest.description: A modest inn with creaking beds and a sleepy cat by the door.

smithy.name: Brackenford Smithy
smithy.description: Heat rolls from the forge. Tools and half-finished blades line the walls.

market.name: Brackenford Market
market.description: Stalls crowd together, hawking everything from turnips to trinkets.

temple.name: Temple of the Dawn
temple.description: Sunlight streams through stained glass onto a quiet stone altar.

north_gate.name: Brackenford North Gate
north_gate.description: The town's timber gate, guarded and opening onto the King's Road.

kings_road.name: The King's Road
kings_road.description: A broad dirt road winding between the realm's regions.

millfield.name: Millfield
millfield.description: Golden fields of grain ripple in the wind around an old mill.

thornwood_edge.name: Thornwood Edge
thornwood_edge.description: The treeline looms dark and close. The road dwindles to a path.

deep_thornwood.name: Deep Thornwood
deep_thornwood.description: Ancient trees blot out the sky. It is easy to lose one's way here.

old_shrine.name: The Forgotten Shrine
old_shrine.description: A crumbling shrine reclaimed by moss and root. Bones litter the ground.

bandit_camp.name: Redhand Camp
bandit_camp.description: A squalid camp of lean-tos and cookfires, marked by red-painted handprints.

mountain_foot.name: Foot of the Frostpeaks
mountain_foot.description: The road gives way to rocky switchbacks climbing into the heights.

mine_entrance.name: Old Mine Entrance
mine_entrance.description: A timber-framed shaft descends into darkness. Rusted carts lie abandoned.

deep_mine.name: The Deep Mine
deep_mine.description: Black tunnels twist down into the mountain's roots. Something stirs.

frostpeak_pass.name: Frostpeak Pass
frostpeak_pass.description: A knife-edge pass through wind-scoured ice and bare grey rock.

dragon_lair.name: The Wyrm's Roost
dragon_lair.description: A vast cavern of scorched stone and gleaming hoarded gold. Heat shimmers.

fen_road.name: Mirewater Causeway
fen_road.description: A rotting boardwalk threads across black, reed-choked water.

witch_hut.name: The Hedge-Witch's Hut
witch_hut.description: A stilted shack hung with drying herbs, charms and stranger things.

sunken_ruins.name: The Sunken Ruins
sunken_ruins.description: Drowned halls of a forgotten people, half-swallowed by the fen.

capital_gate.name: Highcrown Gates
capital_gate.description: Towering white walls and a portcullis flanked by the Crown's knights.

grand_market.name: The Grand Bazaar
grand_market.description: A sprawling covered market where fortunes change hands hourly.

cathedral.name: Cathedral of the Dawn
cathedral.description: A soaring nave of white stone and gold, hymns echoing from the choir.

conclave_tower.name: The Conclave Spire
conclave_tower.description: A slender tower crackling with contained magic and quiet scholarship.

castle_keep.name: Highcrown Keep
castle_keep.description: The throne room of Aldermere, all banners, marble and cold authority.

vale.name: The Verdant Vale
vale.description: Rolling farmland and the bustling town of Brackenford.
vale.lore: The Vale has known peace for thirty years, since the last war.

wilds.name: Thornwood
wilds.description: A dark and tangled forest where bandits and beasts roam.
wilds.lore: They say the Thornwood swallows those who wander from the path.

mountains.name: The Frostpeak Range
mountains.description: Jagged peaks, old mines, and colder things in the high passes.
mountains.lore: A wyrm is said to slumber atop the highest peak.

marsh.name: Mirewater Fen
marsh.description: A brooding wetland of black water and creeping mist.
marsh.lore: The Fen keeps its secrets, and its dead, close.

capital.name: Highcrown
capital.description: The grand capital, seat of the Crown and the Conclave.
capital.lore: Highcrown's white walls have never been breached.

crown.name: The Crown of Aldermere
crown.description: The royal house and its knights, sworn to law and order.

merchants.name: The Merchant Coalition
merchants.description: A wealthy guild that controls trade across the realm.

conclave.name: The Arcane Conclave
conclave.description: Keepers of magical lore who guard dangerous secrets.

dawn.name: The Order of the Dawn
dawn.description: A faith devoted to light, healing and the smiting of evil.

shadowhand.name: The Shadow Hand
shadowhand.description: A secretive thieves' guild that thrives in the cracks of society.

redhand.name: The Redhand Brigands
redhand.description: Cutthroats and raiders who prey on the roads and the weak.

fenfolk.name: The Fenfolk
fenfolk.description: Reclusive marsh-dwellers and their inscrutable hedge-witch.

rumor_pool: they say a dragon has woken atop the Frostpeaks after three hundred years
the Redhand bandits grow bolder every week on the King's Road
the dead don't rest easy in the Mirewater Fen, or so the fenfolk whisper
the Conclave in Highcrown is buying up old books at any price
an old shrine in the Thornwood has gone strange — bones, and a cold that bites
Master Coyne would sell his own grandmother if the price was right
the Crown will make a lord of whoever ends the realm's troubles
moonpetal fetches a good coin from the temple healers
miners struck something in the deep mine they wish they hadn't
the eastern lords sharpen their swords while Aldermere looks the other way
